entry_rationale: STRONGLY FAVORED: This contract resolves on the official NYMEX/ICE-published daily settlement for the WTI front-month on 2026-03-06, and the market is priced at 96% YES (implying a small remaining tail risk). Supporting Evidence: The settlement threshold is a single point (> $73.99), and once the official settlement is published it is not subject to discretionary recounts/appeals; resolution is a mechanical reference-price check against the published settlement. Resolution Source: NYMEX (CME Group) WTI Crude Oil futures official daily settlement publication (and Kalshi’s market rules referencing that official settlement). Risk Checklist: clear resolution source ✓; no formal challenges/appeals path ✓; stable inputs/defined observation time ✓. Risk Level: LOW (selected as the single lowest-risk available candidate after excluding Tier 1 crypto and Tier 2 speaking markets; Tier 3 weather was avoided where possible). Remaining Risks: Intraday oil price volatility before the settlement print could still move settlement below $74.00. Sources: https://www.cmegroup.com/markets/energy/crude-oil/light-sweet-crude.html
